text.title: Junior AI Co-Pilot Curriculum Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for curriculum.json: weeks, modules, exercises, rubric, mentor schedule.

section.title: JSON Schema

list.item: Six core modules all present (prompt anatomy / hallucination check / scoped edits / test-first AI / security boundaries / mentor review).
Rubric ≥ 10 items, each with evidence pointer.
Mentor schedule has ≥ weeks entries with ≥30 min each.
